message:
feat(console): Complete ResourceTableRenderer with URI highlighting and tree view

- Add format_uri() method to highlight URI template parts {name} in yellow
- Add render_tree() method to display resources grouped by URI scheme
- Add extract_uri_prefix() and extract_uri_path() helper methods
- Apply URI highlighting in both table and detail views
- Add comprehensive tests for new functionality:
  - test_uri_template_highlighting
  - test_uri_prefix_extraction
  - test_uri_path_extraction
  - test_resource_tree_render_plain
  - test_resource_tree_empty

Completes bd-j5u acceptance criteria:
- [x] URI templates are highlighted
- [x] Tree view groups by prefix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
